source_facts.field_read: There is a live national AI ecosystem call.

source_facts.checked_fact: The official page lists application intake from 15 June 2026 to 18 September 2026.
source_facts.field_read: The window is long enough for scouting and decision work.

source_facts.checked_fact: The official page lists pre registration completion by 14 September 2026 at 17:30.
source_facts.field_read: A decision should happen well before September.

source_facts.checked_fact: The listed priority areas are smart production systems, smart agriculture, food and livestock, financial technologies, climate change and sustainability, and smart education technologies.
source_facts.field_read: Direct health AI fit is weak and should not be forced.

source_facts.checked_fact: The official page says the model expects a consortium including a customer organization, at least one technology provider company, and at least one experienced university research lab, center, public research center, or institute.
source_facts.field_read: Dr. Ozkan cannot act alone as an applicant without a consortium route.

source_facts.checked_fact: The official page says the consortium is expected to meet TÜBİTAK Yapay Zeka Enstitüsü before application and include an intent declaration form.
source_facts.field_read: Any real application path needs early route clearance and partner commitment.

sidecar_modules.name: Fit warning
sidecar_modules.content: State that health is not a listed 2026 priority area and that the sidecar is only adjacent AI assurance infrastructure.

sidecar_modules.name: Consortium readiness gate
sidecar_modules.content: List the customer organization, technology provider, and research lab roles that would need to exist before any action.
sidecar_modules.decision_value: Separates public proof of work from actual application eligibility.

sidecar_modules.name: AI assurance sidecar scope
sidecar_modules.content: Offer data quality gates, source support review, no ranking failure reports, and human review protocols as cross domain AI safety support.
sidecar_modules.decision_value: Creates a useful angle without pretending to be the core funded product.

sidecar_modules.name: Non submission boundary
sidecar_modules.content: Block application, intent declaration, meeting request, partner commitment, budget, and terms language until Dr. Ozkan clears a route.

sidecar_modules.name: Scouting list
sidecar_modules.content: Prepare a short list of possible eligible domain routes only after a health adjacent or assurance aligned fit is selected.
sidecar_modules.decision_value: Turns the call into an opportunity radar rather than a rushed submission.
